news.title:
Maruti Suzuki receives draft assessment order of ₹5,786 crore for FY23 from IT Dept.
The company will file objections with DRP, stating no financial or operational impact.
news.summary:
Maruti Suzuki receives draft assessment order of ₹5,786 crore for FY23 from IT Dept.
The company will file objections with DRP, stating no financial or operational impact.

news.title:
Maruti Suzuki shared an investor presentation for its March 17, 2026 meeting.
The presentation highlights its 40-year India presence, market share, and demand growth.
news.summary:
Maruti Suzuki shared an investor presentation for its March 17, 2026 meeting.
The presentation highlights its 40-year India presence, market share, and demand growth.

news.title:
Maruti Suzuki India Ltd shared an investor presentation detailing its India strategy, financial performance, and initiatives.
Key highlights include GST reforms boosting sales, SUV lineup expansion, BEV plans, and biogas ventures to support sustainability.
news.summary:
Maruti Suzuki India Ltd shared an investor presentation detailing its India strategy, financial performance, and initiatives.
Key highlights include GST reforms boosting sales, SUV lineup expansion, BEV plans, and biogas ventures to support sustainability.

news.title:
Maruti Suzuki reports operations proceeding as planned despite potential energy supply challenges.
The company is monitoring the evolving situation and will update stakeholders on significant developments.
news.summary:
Maruti Suzuki reports operations proceeding as planned despite potential energy supply challenges.
The company is monitoring the evolving situation and will update stakeholders on significant developments.

news.title:
Nomura highlights gas shortage risk for auto companies, including Maruti.
TVS Motor and Bajaj Auto are also expected to be impacted.
news.summary:
Nomura highlights gas shortage risk for auto companies, including Maruti.
TVS Motor and Bajaj Auto are also expected to be impacted.

news.title:
Nifty Auto index dropped 3% due to West Asia tensions; stocks like M&M, Maruti, Eicher, Tata Motors led declines.
Natural gas supply fears, crude above $100/barrel, and rising costs pose operational risks to auto manufacturers.
news.summary:
Nifty Auto index dropped 3% due to West Asia tensions; stocks like M&M, Maruti, Eicher, Tata Motors led declines.
Natural gas supply fears, crude above $100/barrel, and rising costs pose operational risks to auto manufacturers.

news.title:
Middle East tensions may disrupt India's $9B auto exports, affecting shipping routes like Strait of Hormuz.
Maruti Suzuki & Hyundai face higher freight costs; Gulf market key for 25% of India's vehicle exports.
news.summary:
Middle East tensions may disrupt India's $9B auto exports, affecting shipping routes like Strait of Hormuz.
Maruti Suzuki & Hyundai face higher freight costs; Gulf market key for 25% of India's vehicle exports.

news.title:
Rising commodity costs may drive price hikes in April for auto and durable firms, impacting Tata Motors and Maruti Suzuki.
Durable makers anticipate 5-6% increase due to higher metal, crude-linked derivatives costs and supply chain disruptions.
news.summary:
Rising commodity costs may drive price hikes in April for auto and durable firms, impacting Tata Motors and Maruti Suzuki.
Durable makers anticipate 5-6% increase due to higher metal, crude-linked derivatives costs and supply chain disruptions.

news.title:
Maruti Suzuki's margins declined 200 bps as Commodity Cost Index rose 20%.
Market share dropped to 40%, with Middle East exports at 13-15%.
news.summary:
Maruti Suzuki's margins declined 200 bps as Commodity Cost Index rose 20%.
Market share dropped to 40%, with Middle East exports at 13-15%.

news.title: Morgan Stanley has downgraded India to equal weight and removed Maruti from its focus list.
news.summary: Morgan Stanley has downgraded India to equal weight and removed Maruti from its focus list.

news.title:
HSBC reiterates 'Buy' on Maruti Suzuki, revising TP to Rs 17,400 from Rs 18,000.
The revision reflects higher raw material costs affecting Maruti Suzuki's outlook.
news.summary:
HSBC reiterates 'Buy' on Maruti Suzuki, revising TP to Rs 17,400 from Rs 18,000.
The revision reflects higher raw material costs affecting Maruti Suzuki's outlook.

news.title:
Maruti Suzuki witnessed an NSE block trade worth Rs. 106.97 crore.
Approximately 75,244 shares were traded at Rs. 14,217 per share.
news.summary:
Maruti Suzuki witnessed an NSE block trade worth Rs. 106.97 crore.
Approximately 75,244 shares were traded at Rs. 14,217 per share.

news.title:
Maruti Suzuki plans to increase production capacity by 500,000 cars next fiscal.
Current installed capacity stands at 2.6M units across Haryana and Gujarat.
news.summary:
Maruti Suzuki plans to increase production capacity by 500,000 cars next fiscal.
Current installed capacity stands at 2.6M units across Haryana and Gujarat.

news.title:
Indian auto firms, including Maruti Suzuki, monitor West Asia crisis impact on exports.
Major exporters target GCC markets like UAE, Saudi Arabia, Oman amid rising tensions.
news.summary:
Indian auto firms, including Maruti Suzuki, monitor West Asia crisis impact on exports.
Major exporters target GCC markets like UAE, Saudi Arabia, Oman amid rising tensions.

news.title:
Middle East tensions may impact Indian auto stocks like Maruti Suzuki, Tata Motors, Hyundai Motor, Ashok Leyland, and Bajaj Auto.
Geopolitical risks threaten Gulf shipping routes, raising costs and weakening order visibility for key export-oriented automakers.
news.summary:
Middle East tensions may impact Indian auto stocks like Maruti Suzuki, Tata Motors, Hyundai Motor, Ashok Leyland, and Bajaj Auto.
Geopolitical risks threaten Gulf shipping routes, raising costs and weakening order visibility for key export-oriented automakers.

news.title:
Maruti Suzuki operates above capacity as demand surges, with Feb wholesales at 1.64 lakh and retail sales up 12% YoY.
Pending bookings stand at 1.9 lakh units; new Kharkhoda line from April to boost capacity by 1.2 lakh units annually.
news.summary:
Maruti Suzuki operates above capacity as demand surges, with Feb wholesales at 1.64 lakh and retail sales up 12% YoY.
Pending bookings stand at 1.9 lakh units; new Kharkhoda line from April to boost capacity by 1.2 lakh units annually.

news.title:
Maruti Suzuki sold 213,995 units in Feb 2026, with domestic sales of 164,130 units.
Exports reached 39,155 units; FY 2025-26 sales hit 2.2M, surpassing last year's.
news.summary:
Maruti Suzuki sold 213,995 units in Feb 2026, with domestic sales of 164,130 units.
Exports reached 39,155 units; FY 2025-26 sales hit 2.2M, surpassing last year's.

news.title:
Maruti Suzuki states limited export exposure amid US-Iran tensions.
Company is closely monitoring Middle East developments after strikes.
news.summary:
Maruti Suzuki states limited export exposure amid US-Iran tensions.
Company is closely monitoring Middle East developments after strikes.

news.title:
Auto demand remains strong as Maruti Suzuki reports higher Feb sales driven by retail momentum.
Tata Motors, Mahindra & Mahindra, and Hyundai also posted increased vehicle dispatches last month.
news.summary:
Auto demand remains strong as Maruti Suzuki reports higher Feb sales driven by retail momentum.
Tata Motors, Mahindra & Mahindra, and Hyundai also posted increased vehicle dispatches last month.

news.title:
Maruti Suzuki saw an NSE block trade of ~46,129 shares at Rs. 15,004.
The total trade value was Rs. 69.2 crores.
news.summary:
